title: Savvana+ by Anoosh
description:
"The Savanna will never be the same again! 🦒🦌🦏
From peaceful giraffes to deadly rhinos… do you dare to step in?"
body:
![savvana+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b047c408574d1c172d940129cc6bac5c54d6b773.jpeg)

Savanna Expansion Mod
This mod brings the Savanna biome to life with new wildlife and challenges:    
**Deer**:Drops meat and leather, antlers can be crafted into a unique sword.
![Savvana+ Deer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/794e2c846a5681dbb31d1de2cb3c9ab57a586a33_0.webp)
**Giraffe**: Drops its own meat and leather for crafting light armor, great for early-game.
![Savvana+ Giraffe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec9cf55ab1a641f66c5bac3e7b802c292bb2417_0.webp)
**Hyena**: Aggressive towards players and other animals; can be tamed with bones to fight alongside you.
![Savvana+ Hyena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f816b03836f0dd355be44f3936054b6eacee95d_0.webp)
**Lion**: Neutral unless provoked, but extremely powerful.
![Savvana+ Lion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/688d2d1c2b13437217f85dda13a56365e798ba94_0.webp)
**Long-tailed Monkey**: Hostile to monsters (zombies, skeletons, etc.), peaceful unless attacked, then mobs you in groups.
![Savvana+ Monkey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdc73edf2fe248d9b2381465947863414ac91e5a_0.webp)
**Rhino**: The Savanna’s tank — 200 HP, 50 attack damage. Drops horn and leather for crafting armor stronger than Netherite, but you’ll need to take down at least 30 of them to get a full set.
![Savvana+ Rhino](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ddc79251cd89c3325a3889aa1fe09be5ee6984a_0.webp)
**Zebra**: Peaceful and ridable.
![Savvana+ Zebra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ccb12b1795b05296f5f92a368b134cb76c07439_0.webp)
A living, dangerous, and thrilling Savanna… ready for your adventure!
